generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT sensor capturing real-time occupancy data in building zones, integrated with BIM metadata for semantic enrichment"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance EnvironmentalConditionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT sensor capturing environmental metrics including temperature, humidity, and light levels from building zones"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalDataTransmitted
]

instance EnergyConsumptionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "BAS sensor measuring real-time energy consumption across building systems, synchronized with BIM device configurations"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyDataTransmitted
]

instance SystemPerformanceSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "BAS sensor monitoring building system performance metrics, integrated with BIM for operational data extraction"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SystemPerformanceDataTransmitted
]

instance PostOccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Specialized sensor capturing post-occupancy data used in BOREALIS reinforcement learning for adaptive control refinement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData PostOccupancyDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction
instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy data transmitted via Eclipse Hono lightweight messaging protocol to Eclipse Ditto device management framework"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance EnvironmentalDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Environmental metrics (temperature, humidity, light) transmitted via Eclipse Hono to Ditto for synchronization with DT"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnvironmentalConditionSensor
]

instance EnergyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Energy consumption data streamed via Eclipse Hono to Ditto for real-time building energy monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyConsumptionSensor
]

instance SystemPerformanceDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Building system performance metrics transmitted via Eclipse Hono for operational state monitoring in DT"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SystemPerformanceSensor
]

instance PostOccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Post-occupancy sensor data transmitted for BOREALIS reinforcement learning model training and control optimization"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PostOccupancySensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance EnrichedBimModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Semantically enriched BIM model containing device metadata (sensor/actuator IDs, control logic) and Eclipse Hono/Ditto middleware configurations"
]

instance DeviceTwinRuntimeArtifact : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Automatically generated device twin artifacts from BIM transformations, including control policies and visualization assets"
]

instance OperationalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time sensor feeds including occupancy, environmental metrics, and system performance data for DT analytics"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted, EnvironmentalDataTransmitted, SystemPerformanceDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDitto
]

instance HistoricalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Historical operational data used for trend analysis and performance gap identification between design and operation"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnergyDataTransmitted, PostOccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ReinforcementLearningLibrary
]

instance VisualizationModel : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "3D visualization assets for Unreal Engine 5 immersive monitoring of building operations and system states"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted, EnvironmentalDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngine5
]

// C11: Enablers
instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Lightweight IoT messaging protocol facilitating real-time bidirectional data exchange between physical sensors and DT"
    DTDFVocab:enables BidirectionalCommunicationService
]

instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Digital twin framework providing device management, data synchronization, and standardized twin representations"
    DTDFVocab:enables DeviceTwinManagementService
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Rich visualization environment enabling immersive 3D monitoring and simulation of building operations"
    DTDFVocab:enables ImmersiveMonitoringService
]

instance ModelDrivenEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-driven engineering tools automating BIM-to-runtime transformations for device twins and control interfaces"
]

instance ReinforcementLearningLibrary : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Reinforcement learning libraries used in BOREALIS for adaptive control optimization (e.g., lighting systems)"
    DTDFVocab:enables AdaptiveControlOptimizationService
]

instance BimTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM tools for semantic enrichment of static models with runtime aspects including sensor/actuator configurations"
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing real-time visualization of building operations via Unreal Engine 5 for facility management"
    DTDFVocab:provides BuildingStateInsight, EnergyConsumptionInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service identifying performance gaps between design and operation using predictive analytics and reinforcement learning"
    DTDFVocab:provides PerformanceGapInsight, OptimizationRecommendationAction
]

instance AdaptiveControlOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service implementing BOREALIS reinforcement learning for adaptive control strategies (e.g., energy-efficient lighting)"
    DTDFVocab:provides LightingOptimizationAction, EnergyEfficiencyRecommendation
]

instance DeviceTwinManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service managing device twins including runtime configuration and synchronization via Eclipse Ditto"
    DTDFVocab:provides DeviceStateInsight, ConfigurationUpdateAction
]

instance ImmersiveMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling 3D immersive monitoring of building systems and environmental conditions in Unreal Engine 5"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnvironmentalConditionInsight, SystemStateVisualization
]

instance BidirectionalCommunicationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service facilitating automated commissioning and bidirectional communication between virtual and physical assets"
    DTDFVocab:provides PhysicalVirtualSyncInsight, ControlActionExecution
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance BuildingStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time operational insights including system states and energy consumption visualized in Unreal Engine 5"
]

instance EnergyConsumptionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detailed energy consumption metrics enabling facility managers to identify inefficiencies and optimization opportunities"
]

instance PerformanceGapInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identified discrepancies between designed performance and actual operational performance using predictive analytics"
]

instance OptimizationRecommendationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generated recommendations for energy-efficient lighting schedules and HVAC adjustments"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance LightingOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated lighting control adjustments based on reinforcement learning optimization from BOREALIS"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnergyEfficiencyRecommendation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data-driven recommendations for improving building energy efficiency through adaptive control strategies"
]

instance DeviceStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Current state information of all physical devices and their virtual twins for operational monitoring"
]

instance ConfigurationUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamic runtime configuration adjustments (e.g., adding sensors, updating control policies) without full redeployment"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EnvironmentalConditionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time environmental metrics (temperature, humidity, light levels) for indoor environmental quality assessment"
]

instance SystemStateVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "3D visualization of building system states and operational parameters in Unreal Engine 5 environment"
]

instance PhysicalVirtualSyncInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Verification of synchronization fidelity between physical building and its digital twin over time"
]

instance ControlActionExecution : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated execution of control actions on physical actuators based on DT recommendations"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The **virtual-to-physical interaction** is enabled through **control signals generated by the DT** and transmitted back to the **Building Control Systems (BCS)** or **actuators** in the physical building. The framework leverages **model-driven transformations** to generate **runtime interfaces** for bidirectional communication, ensuring that decisions made in the DT (e.g., lighting adjustments, energy optimization) are executed in the physical system. **Eclipse Hono** and **Ditto** facilitate this interaction by providing **standardized protocols** for data exchange, while **Unreal Engine 5** offers an immersive visualization layer for monitoring and manual overrides by facility managers."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The **twinning time-scale** is **real-time** for critical operational interactions (e.g., sensor data acquisition, control signal transmission) and **near-real-time** for analytics and optimization services. The **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric** is used to evaluate the **synchronization fidelity** between the DT and its physical counterpart, ensuring high temporal alignment. The **BOREALIS** project demonstrates **iterative refinement** of control policies over time using **post-occupancy sensor data**, indicating a **dynamic, evolving twinning process** rather than a static snapshot."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The **DT constellation** is orchestrated as a **service-oriented architecture** with the following components:
  1. **BIM Core**: Semantic backbone for static and dynamic building data.
  2. **Middleware Layer**: **Eclipse Hono/Ditto** for real-time data exchange and device management.
  3. **Control Layer**: **Building Control Systems (BCS)** and **reinforcement learning modules** (BOREALIS) for adaptive operations.
  4. **Visualization Layer**: **Unreal Engine 5** for immersive interaction.
  5. **Extension Points**: Modular interfaces for **custom service integration** (e.g., analytics, AI-driven decision support).
  The constellation supports **bidirectional synchronization**, **scalable deployment**, and **interoperability** across heterogeneous systems, adhering to **AECO-specific standards** (e.g., BIM)."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The **life-cycle stages** covered by this DT system span from **design and construction** to **operation and refurbishment**, aligning with the **BIM-based life cycle management** paradigm. The DT represents the physical building in three key phases:
  1. **As-designed (ideal)**: Static BIM model with semantic enrichment for runtime aspects.
  2. **As-manufactured**: Integration of **device metadata** (e.g., sensor/actuator configurations) during commissioning.
  3. **As-operated**: **Real-time synchronization** with live data, enabling **predictive maintenance, adaptive control, and performance optimization**.
  The framework supports **longitudinal twinning**, ensuring compatibility with **existing AECO standards** (e.g., BIM) and **future-proofing** for evolving operational requirements."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The **fidelity and validity considerations** include:
  - **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric**: Quantifies the **alignment** between the DT and its physical counterpart, assessing **temporal and semantic synchronization**.
  - **Automated validation**: Ensures **semantic consistency** between BIM models and runtime artifacts during deployment.
  - **Uncertainty management**: Addressed through **real-time sensor data integration** and **adaptive control strategies** (e.g., reinforcement learning in BOREALIS).
  - **Error handling**: **Bidirectional communication protocols** (Hono/Ditto) include **reconciliation mechanisms** for data discrepancies.
  - **Verification**: **Case study evaluations** (e.g., Living Lab) demonstrate **operational effectiveness** and **scalability** of the framework."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT employs Eclipse Hono and Ditto for real-time data exchange, providing standardized APIs and protocols for bidirectional communication between physical assets and the virtual twin. The system generates runtime interfaces to facilitate this interaction, ensuring low-latency synchronization. While specific network protocols (e.g., MQTT, HTTP) are not explicitly detailed, the middleware layer abstracts these concerns, enabling seamless integration with IoT/BAS devices. The focus is on interoperability and scalability, with extension points for custom protocol integrations."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The **horizontal integration** with external systems is enabled through:
  - **Standardized APIs**: Generated from BIM models for **interoperability** with **ERP, CMMS, or other AECO tools**.
  - **Middleware agnosticism**: **Eclipse Hono/Ditto** support **protocol-agnostic communication**, allowing integration with **legacy IoT platforms** or **proprietary BCS**.
  - **Data normalization**: Ensures **semantic consistency** across heterogeneous data sources (e.g., sensor feeds, BIM models).
  - **Service-oriented architecture**: **Modular extension points** enable **plug-and-play integration** of third-party services (e.g., weather data, occupancy analytics)."
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "Data ownership is primarily with the **physical twin (PT) owner** (e.g., building owner or facility manager). The framework adheres to privacy regulations (e.g., GDPR) and supports:
  - **Role-based access control (RBAC)**: For secure data sharing among stakeholders.
  - **Data anonymization**: For sensitive operational data.
  - **Compliance with AECO standards**: For data governance and interoperability."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to AECO-specific standards, primarily Building Information Modeling (BIM), which serves as the semantic backbone for asset representation. The framework leverages standardized middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto) for real-time data exchange and interoperability. While specific standards like IFC, COBie, or OASIS AMQP are not explicitly mentioned, the model-driven approach ensures compliance with domain-wide best practices for DT deployment in the construction industry."
]
